race.comment: SPIRIT OF GAIA (12) presents third up in a winnable affair. Two runs back have been good, beaten less than a length cumulatively, in a tricky spot at Caulfield Heath last time out. Gets on a big deck here and draws to effect which can see her break through. SEXY WARRIOR (11) resumes having run a solid race in a stronger maiden here on debut, finishing sixth. She struck wet ground there and could be a sharp improver on top of the ground here fresh. MYSTICAL GEM (10) resumes having run an even race on debut at Cranbourne. That may have come a bit soon, she's jumped out well leading in and can do much better this time around. PULL MY FINGER (4) is going well without winning, placing in his past two. He looks to get a good run here and should be competitive again. CLIFFS HANGER (6) made nice improvement at her second start and could be a rough hope with more upside.
